title: Crisp Samosas with Eastern Flair
description: A twist on the traditional Indian snack, these crispy samosas are filled with spiced potatoes and peas, served with a side of tangy chutney.

ingredients.name: Ginger, grated
ingredients.notes: Add to onion and cook for 1 minute

ingredients.name: Garlic, minced
ingredients.notes: Add to onion mixture and cook for 1 minute

instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
Roll out the dough according to the package instructions, cutting into desired samosa shapes.
In a mixing bowl, combine the cooked potatoes, peas, onion mixture, ginger, garlic, and lemon juice.
Add the Eastern spice blend to the potato mixture and mix well.
Place a spoonful of the potato mixture onto one half of a dough shape, and brush the edges with water.
Fold the other half of the dough over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Repeat with the remaining dough and filling.
Fry the samosas in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot with a side of tangy chutney.
